seo.title: Fabric to Model Catwalk – AI Fashion Video Generator | OpenCreator
seo.description: Transform fabric swatches into stunning runway videos. AI generates skirt designs from fabric, puts them on virtual models, and creates professional catwalk videos with VEO 3.1.

hero.title: Fabric → Skirt → Model Catwalk
hero.description: Upload a fabric swatch and watch AI transform it into a designer skirt, dress it on a virtual model, and generate a professional runway video. Perfect for textile suppliers, fashion designers, and e-commerce brands who want to showcase fabric potential without expensive photoshoots.

steps.title: Upload fabric swatch
steps.description: Provide an image of your fabric or textile material. The AI analyzes the pattern, texture, and color.

steps.title: AI designs the garment
steps.description: Nano Banana Pro transforms your fabric into a stylish skirt design with professional tailoring and fashion-forward aesthetics.

steps.title: Virtual model fitting
steps.description: The AI places the designed skirt on a realistic virtual model with proper fit, draping, and full-body presentation.

steps.title: Generate runway video
steps.description: VEO 3.1 creates a professional catwalk video with the model walking, turning, and showcasing the garment from multiple angles.

items.question: What is the Fabric to Model Catwalk workflow?
items.answer: This AI workflow transforms fabric images into complete fashion videos. It uses Nano Banana Pro to design garments from fabric swatches, fits them on virtual models, and generates professional runway videos using VEO 3.1.

items.question: What kind of fabric images work best?
items.answer: Clear, well-lit images of fabric swatches work best. The AI can handle various patterns, textures, and colors including prints, solids, and textured materials.

items.question: Can I customize the model appearance?
items.answer: Yes. The workflow allows you to specify model characteristics like ethnicity, age range, and styling preferences to match your target market.

items.question: What video output formats are available?
items.answer: Videos are generated in 9:16 vertical format at 1080p resolution, perfect for social media, e-commerce listings, and fashion presentations.

items.question: How long are the generated runway videos?
items.answer: Each video clip is approximately 8 seconds, showing the model walking, posing, and showcasing the garment with professional catwalk movements.

items.question: Can I use this for different garment types?
items.answer: The current workflow is optimized for skirts and dresses. The AI adapts the design based on the fabric characteristics to create appropriate styles.

items.question: Is this suitable for commercial use?
items.answer: Absolutely. The generated content is designed for commercial applications including e-commerce, marketing, and fashion presentations.

items.question: How does this compare to traditional photoshoots?
items.answer: This workflow can save 90%+ on costs and time compared to traditional fashion photoshoots, while allowing unlimited iterations and variations.
